title: dasymaschalon megalanthum
intro: Dasymaschalon megalanthum, also known as the Bornean dasymaschalon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. The plant is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dasymaschalon megalanthum include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, and its medicinal properties are often extracted using solvents or distilled in steam distillation.
